title: Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful North African stew made with tender lamb, aromatic spices, and sweet dried fruits.
instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and turmeric, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the prunes and 1 cup of water, and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley, if desired.
